title: Mapuzo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mapuzo''' may refer to one of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Mapuzo system]]''', a star system in the [[Mid Rim Territories]].
**'''[[Mapuzo]]''', a [[planet]] in the eponymous system
***The '''[[Mapuzo battery]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Imperial Military|Military]] unit stationed on Mapuzo

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Mapuzo system/Legends|Mapuzo system]]''', a star system in the [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan sector]]
*The '''[[Mapuzo break-in]]'''

{{Disambig}}
